info.title: cisco-l3vpn-routing-policy
info.description:
This YANG module defines models that l3vpn-ntw-deviations
will make ietf-l3vpn-ntw to depend on.

cnc-host.description: host name or ip address of the target CNC Cluster

cnc-port.description: port number of the target CNC Cluster

parameters.name: policy-definition-name
parameters.description:
Name of the top-level policy definition; this name
is used in references to the current policy.

parameters.description: controlling descendant nodes in response

parameters.name: depth
parameters.description: limit the depth of nodes in response

parameters.description: xpath expression to filter data nodes in response

cisco-l3vpn-routing-policy:source-prefix.description: List of the defined source prefix sets (list)

mode.description: Mode of the prefix set (address families IPv4 or IPv6) (leaf)

prefix-list.description: List of prefixes in the prefix set. (list)

ip-prefix.description:
The IP prefix represented as an IPv6 or IPv4 network
number followed by a prefix length with an intervening
slash character as a delimiter.  All members of the
prefix-set MUST be of the same address family as the
prefix-set mode. (leaf)

prefixes.description:
Container for the list of prefixes in a policy
prefix list. (non-presence)

name.description: Name of the prefix set to reference the set in match conditions. (leaf)

items.description: <1-4294967295> list with single tag-value member allowed. Should match to a color value. (leaf-list)

name.description:
Name of the tag set; this is used as a label to
reference the set in actions conditions. (leaf)

Name of the top-level policy definition; this name
is used in references to the current policy. (leaf)

statement.description:
Policy statements group conditions and actions
within a policy definition evaluated in
the order specified. (list)

prefix-set.description: References a defined prefix set. Used only in the MVPN case. (leaf)

match-source-prefix-set.description: Match a referenced prefix-set. Used only in the MVPN case. (presence)

match-dest-prefix-set.description:
Match a referenced prefix-set according to the
logic defined in the match-set-options leaf. (presence)

conditions.description:
Condition statements for the current policy
statement. (non-presence)

set-fast-reroute.description: Set Fast Re-route protection for MVPN Tree-SID route policy only (presence)

items.description: List of policy names in sequence to be applied. (leaf-list)

apply-policy.description: Anchor point for extra routing policies in the model (presence)

ext-community-set-ref.description: References a defined extended community set by name. Creating routing-policy tag-set is mandatory and needs to be mapped here. (leaf)

set-ext-community.description: Action to set the extended community attributes (presence)

policy-result.description:
Select accept disposition for the route.
Statement cannot contain conditions with only policy-result action (leaf)

actions.description:
Top-level container for policy action
statements. (non-presence)

cisco-l3vpn-routing-policy:dest-prefix-s.description: List of the defined destination prefix sets (list)

prefix-set MUST be of the same address family as the
prefix-set mode. (leaf)

prefixes.description:

prefix list. (non-presence)

name.description: Name of the prefix set to reference the set in match conditions. (leaf)
